EmailTemplate.name: CP App Login Intimation Email V2
EmailTemplate.subject: Introducing Runwal Elevate – Your Exclusive Channel Partner App
EmailTemplate.textOnly: Dear {!Broker__c.Name}, We are delighted to introduce Runwal Elevate — our brand-new, purpose-built app designed exclusively for our valued Channel Partners. Everything you need to serve your customers, manage your business, and stay ahead is now in the palm of your hand. What's Inside the App 🏢 Project Details — Explore in-depth information on all Runwal projects — specs, amenities, and availability — in one place. 📄 Offers & Brochures — Download the latest offer sheets and instantly share them with prospective customers. 💰 Billings & Invoices — Access your billing statements and transaction history anytime, without a single call. 📊 Payout Tracking — Stay on top of your earnings — view payout schedules and commission statuses in real time. Download the App ▶ Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.lockated.runwal.cp App Store: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/runwal-elevate/id6758725386 Your Login Credentials You can login using your registered Email ID or Phone Number: ✉ Email: {!Broker__c.RW_Email__c} 📱 Phone Number: {!Broker__c.RW_Mobile_No__c} 🔒 Default Password: runwal@1234 ⚠ For your security, please change your password after your first login. This app is exclusively available to our registered Channel Partners. Should you face any issues or need assistance, please reach out to your dedicated Sales Representative. We look forward to growing together with this powerful new tool at your fingertips.
